Video.summary: Les Brown, with cameo appearances by Bob Proctor, David Meltzer, Mary Morrissey and special guest, celebrity boxer and motivator, Sugar Ray Leonard
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Les Brown

Video.summary: Your day 5 practice introduces principles of stability or Sthira. Though this practice we learn to to steady the mind as we strengthen the body. Build on yesterday’s practice to marry effort with ease. Invite your breath to be smooth and even as we continue to build on your foundation.
Video.title: Day 5: Stability

Video.summary: Your day 6 practice invites you to use core work to get clear. In this session we use controlled movement to activate the muscles of the abdominal for a strong and healthy back and strengthen your whole self.
Video.title: Day 6: Clarity

Video.summary: Your Day 7 practice is an invitation right to the good stuff. This fiery session is a warming sequence that guides to you create a healthy flow of energy in the body welcoming total mind and body health.
Video.title: Day 7: Prana

Video.summary: Your day 9 practice asks you to check in with body and breath as a way of cultivating more awareness. The journey continues! The vocabulary grows. Move fearlessly through this practice by simply listening to your body. Check your habits and move with intention as a way of moving forward with confidence and focus.
Video.title: Day 9: Bold

Video.summary: Your day 10 practice starts with a standing warm up and eases into a yoga flow for balance and transformation! Bring calm alertness to the mind and body as you continue to ride the wave of the breath. Build a strong foundation to set yourself up for greatness. Be patient and courageous.
Video.title: Day 10: Balance

Video.summary: Admissions tells a transformational tale about what it takes to find lasting peace.
Video.title: Admissions

Video.summary: Thousands applied. 40 of the best people were picked and 8 people earned the right to compete for the Grand Prize. Which ONE of them actually Plays to WIN?
Video.title: Play To Win- Episode 5

Video.summary: Why young Americans are having less sex than ever before. Plus, how having a good time in the bedroom can help you in the boardroom.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Why Young People are Having Less Sex

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Why Young People are Having Less Sex
Sex Talk - Why Young People are Having Less Sex
Sex Talk - Why Young People are Having Less Sex

Video.summary: Remember that sexy dream you had? We dish about what it means. Plus, picking the right condom for him and her. All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - What Do Sexy Dreams Really Mean?

Image.alt: Sex Talk - What Do Sexy Dreams Really Mean?
Sex Talk - What Do Sexy Dreams Really Mean?
Sex Talk - What Do Sexy Dreams Really Mean?

Video.summary: As humans, we need interconnection: We rely on others to survive, especially as children. Yet, we also strive for authenticity. This creates an inherent tension. In this lesson, Dr. Maté discusses what is true human nature — and how the modern world has warped our understanding of our needs.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture
A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture
A Return To Wholeness - Human Nature vs. Modern Culture

Video.summary: Trauma is a wound that you sustain; it's not what happened to you. In this lesson, Dr. Maté explains why traumatic wounds get triggered and how to understand triggers in your process of transformation and healing.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion
A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion
A Return To Wholeness - Approaching Trauma with Curiosity and Compassion

Video.summary: There is a strong link between childhood trauma and health challenges. Dr. Maté demonstrates how to untangle and understand this connection with self-compassion.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma
A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma
A Return To Wholeness - The Connection Between Health and Childhood Trauma

Video.summary: Suffering has deep social causes. In this lesson, Dr. Maté explains how your physiology is impacted by stress and social determinants.
Video.title: A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering

Image.alt: A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering
A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering
A Return To Wholeness - The Social Roots of Suffering

Video.summary: As humans, we are constantly struggling between the poles of what we think we want and what is. When we lose touch with the truth of what is, we create and compound our suffering. What narratives are you constructing? Are they in conflict with the truth of the situation? Are you struggling with what is?
Video.title: Intro to the Judge-Your-Neighbor Worksheet

Video.summary: The way you recall a memory and the way it actually happened might be completely different. The question is, do you know which version feeds you? We can become so wrapped up in our recollections, we convince ourselves of these untruths. Is that person a monster? Were they wishing you harm? Or were they dealing with a difficult situation in the best way they knew how?
Video.title: My Mother Terrifies Me

Video.summary: Stop focusing on the object of your desires and start focusing on the reason for desiring that object in the first place. When you turn it around, you may find that what you really want is completely different than what you’ve been telling yourself.
Video.title: I Want to Be Famous

Video.summary: A single thought plants the seed of a narrative. You feel lonely and unsupported, so, of course, someone must have abandoned you. Over time, the thought “I feel abandoned” grows into the story of an entire childhood. Let’s uproot the thought and untangle the story.
Video.title: My Mom Didn't Fight for Me

Image.alt: My Mom Didn't Fight for Me
My Mom Didn't Fight for Me
My Mom Didn't Fight for Me

Video.summary: Fear is a fickle partner. While it certainly serves a purpose — keeping us out of danger and forcing us to question our assumptions — if we give too much of ourselves over to fear, it will lead us down paths filled with insecurity, broken social interactions, and a persistent struggle against the way things actually are.
Video.title: My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner

Image.alt: My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner
My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner
My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr Jill Bolte Taylor, a Harvard-trained and published neuroanatomist. She shares with us the idea of cellular circuitry and how there are four distinct modules of cells that make up who we are, combining the thinking mind and the emotional side. She discusses her new book, Whole Brain Living: The Anatomy of Choice and the Four Characteristics that Drive Our Life.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Dr Jill Bolte Taylor - Whole Brain Living and Choice

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Dr Jill Bolte Taylor - Whole Brain Living and Choice
The Aware Show: Dr Jill Bolte Taylor - Whole Brain Living and Choice
The Aware Show: Dr Jill Bolte Taylor - Whole Brain Living and Choice

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Professor Robert Thurman, the preeminent scholar and interpreter of Tibetan Buddhist philosophy for the modern world, who believes that Wisdom is Bliss and in fact, that’s the name of his latest book. Thurman is a very close friend of HH Dalai Lama and today he discusses deep ideas about mindfulness and presence and leads us on a joyful exploration into the nature of reality through Buddha’s threefold curriculum.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Robert Thurman - Wisdom is Bliss

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Robert Thurman - Wisdom is Bliss
The Aware Show: Robert Thurman - Wisdom is Bliss
The Aware Show: Robert Thurman - Wisdom is Bliss

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr. Harley Rotbart, a nationally renowned infectious diseases specialist, pediatrician, parenting expert, speaker, and educator who discusses his latest book No Regrets Parenting: Turning Long Days and Short Years into Cherished Moments with Your Kids. He shares special keys for parents to guide children to live a life of wonder and contentment by conscious parenting.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Dr Harley Rotbart - No Regrets Parenting

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Dr Harley Rotbart - No Regrets Parenting
The Aware Show: Dr Harley Rotbart - No Regrets Parenting
The Aware Show: Dr Harley Rotbart - No Regrets Parenting

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews marital and family psychologist Dr. Michael Tobin who believes the secret to a happy, long-lasting relationship is mutual respect for one another. He’s been with his life partner, soulmate, and wife, Deborah, for 47 years, and in practice as a psychologist for more than 45 years. His most recent book, Riding the Edge, A Love Song to Deborah, chronicles his six-month transformative journey.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Dr. Michael Tobin - Secrets to a Loving Relationship

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Dr. Michael Tobin - Secrets to a Loving Relationship
The Aware Show: Dr. Michael Tobin - Secrets to a Loving Relationship
The Aware Show: Dr. Michael Tobin - Secrets to a Loving Relationship

Video.summary: In this episode, we’ll be breaking down several popular diets and eating routines and looking at the different effects they can have on your body.
Video.title: Which Diet Trends are Most Effective?

Image.alt: Which Diet Trends are Most Effective?
Which Diet Trends are Most Effective?
Which Diet Trends are Most Effective?

Video.summary: In this episode, we’ll be looking at some of the top health and wellness issues affecting children and adolescents in 2022, including diabetes, long COVID, and mental health.
Video.title: Supporting Kids and Teens

Video.summary: In this episode, we’ll talk with health experts about the importance of sleep, sharing different techniques and tips that can improve your sleep schedule and help you to wake up each morning feeling rested and refreshed.
Video.title: Secrets to Good Sleep

Video.summary: In this episode, we’ll talk with a group of nurses about their experiences dealing with increased workplace violence and harassment during the COVID-19 pandemic. We’ll also go over the effects of COVID-19 and irregular sleep patterns on depression in children and adults.
Video.title: Mental Health and Depression

Video.summary: Meet the contestants and learn the first of Brian’s 5 step House Hacking formula.
Video.title: EP 1 - Location Location Location

Video.summary: Learn why using properties you don’t own can be so lucrative.
Video.title: EP 2 - Other People's Property

Video.summary: The contestants prepare to make a place livable before guests arrive.
Video.title: EP 3 - We Have Company

Video.summary: It’s time to make the property listing live on the site and accept bookings.
Video.title: EP 4 - Flip the Switch

Video.summary: Find out which contestant is named the winner and becomes Brian’s new business partner.
Video.title: EP 5 - The Finale

Video.summary: Fifteen Giants arrive in Auckland to face their first challenge and compete in teams to with the winning team being free of all consequences of a flying leap into the unknown.
Video.title: New Zealand Part 1

Video.summary: The losers are revealed and one member from each team faces their greatest fear of heights.
Video.title: New Zealand Part 2

Video.summary: Giants go through professional speakers training in order to uplevel their skill prior to taking the stage at the International Technical University of Auckland for INSPIRE Mic
Video.title: New Zealand Part 3

Video.summary: Giants prepare to face the tallest waterfall to commercially raft in the entire world.
Video.title: New Zealand Part 4

Video.summary: In preparation to meet the oldest, pre-Maori tribe of indigenous elders, the Giants call forth the dolphins, then enter the most sacred realm of their entire lives.
Video.title: New Zealand Part 5
